description: CompositionRoyal blue round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves and chest printFittingRegularWash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Remove promptly and line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Up the weekend fun by getting cheeky with this tantra t-shirt. A great gift for those who love guzzling beer, it's the perfect way to set the tone for the weekend masti. Team this cotton t-shirt with cargos or jeans and fashionable lifestyle shoes or sandals from the wide range available at myntra for that unparalleled cool.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6'; Chest-37"; Waist-32"
